questions.title: Tell me about a time you took on something significant outside your area of responsibility.
questions.title_zh: 讲一次你承担了职责范围之外重要事情的经历。

questions.title: Describe a project you led from start to finish.
questions.title_zh: 描述一个你从头到尾领导的项目。

questions.title: Tell me about a time you had to make a decision without all the information you wanted.
questions.title_zh: 讲一次你在没有掌握所有想要信息时不得不做决定的经历。

questions.title: Describe a time you noticed a problem nobody else had flagged and fixed it.
questions.title_zh: 描述一次你发现了别人没注意到的问题并修复它的经历。

questions.title: Tell me about a time you had to step up as a leader without the title.
questions.title_zh: 讲一次你在没有头衔的情况下挺身担当领导者的经历。

questions.title: Tell me about a time you owned a failure that was not entirely your fault.
questions.title_zh: 讲一次你为不完全是你过错的失败承担责任的经历。

questions.title: Describe a long-term project you saw through despite setbacks.
questions.title_zh: 描述一个你在挫折中坚持到底的长期项目。

questions.title: Tell me about a time you had to push back on your own manager.
questions.title_zh: 讲一次你不得不顶撞自己经理的经历。

questions.title: Tell me about a time you disagreed with a coworker. How did you resolve it?
questions.title_zh: 讲一次你与同事意见不合的经历。你如何解决？

questions.title: Describe a conflict you had with a stakeholder or customer.
questions.title_zh: 描述一次你与干系人或客户的冲突。

questions.title: Tell me about a time you had to deliver bad news to a stakeholder.
questions.title_zh: 讲一次你不得不向干系人传达坏消息的经历。

questions.title: Describe a time you had to mediate a conflict between two teammates.
questions.title_zh: 描述一次你在两位队友之间调解冲突的经历。

questions.title: Tell me about a time you committed to a decision you disagreed with.
questions.title_zh: 讲一次你对某个决定不同意但仍投入执行的经历。

questions.title: Describe a time you disagreed with a technical approach the team chose.
questions.title_zh: 描述一次你不同意团队所选技术方案的经历。

questions.title: Tell me about a time you received pushback on an idea you believed in.
questions.title_zh: 讲一次你深信的想法遭到反对的经历。

questions.title: Describe a time you had to challenge senior leadership.
questions.title_zh: 描述一次你必须挑战高级领导的经历。

questions.title: Tell me about a time you failed.
Describe a time a project you owned missed its goal.
questions.title_zh: 描述一次你主导的项目未达成目标的经历。

questions.title: Tell me about a decision you regret.
Describe a time you got critical feedback that was hard to hear.
questions.title_zh: 描述一次你收到难以接受的批评性反馈的经历。

questions.title: Tell me about a time you misjudged someone or something.
questions.title_zh: 讲一次你错判某人或某事的经历。

questions.title: Describe a time you took a risk that did not work out.
questions.title_zh: 描述一次你冒险而没成功的经历。

questions.title: Tell me about a time you had to work with someone difficult.
questions.title_zh: 讲一次你与难相处之人合作的经历。

questions.title: Describe a time you influenced a decision without formal authority.
questions.title_zh: 描述一次你在没有正式权限的情况下影响了某个决策。

questions.title: Tell me about a cross-functional project where alignment was hard.
questions.title_zh: 讲一次对齐困难的跨职能项目。

questions.title: Describe a time you helped a teammate succeed.
questions.title_zh: 描述一次你帮助队友取得成功的经历。

questions.title: Tell me about a time you onboarded or mentored someone new.
questions.title_zh: 讲一次你入职或辅导新人的经历。

questions.title: Describe a time you had to give difficult feedback to a peer.
questions.title_zh: 描述一次你向同伴给出困难反馈的经历。

questions.title: Tell me about a time you had to collaborate with a remote or distributed team.
questions.title_zh: 讲一次你与远程或分布式团队协作的经历。

questions.title: Describe a time you partnered closely with another function (PM, design, sales, legal, etc.).
questions.title_zh: 描述一次你与其他职能（PM、设计、销售、法务等）紧密合作的经历。

questions.title: Tell me about a time you came up with a creative solution to a problem.
questions.title_zh: 讲一次你为问题想出创造性解决方案的经历。

questions.title: Describe a time you worked on something with unclear requirements.
questions.title_zh: 描述一次你做需求不清晰之事的经历。

questions.title: Tell me about a time you proposed something new that was not asked for.
questions.title_zh: 讲一次你提出无人要求的新事物的经历。

questions.title: Describe a time you simplified a complex process.
questions.title_zh: 描述一次你简化复杂流程的经历。

questions.title: Tell me about a time you experimented and the result was unexpected.
questions.title_zh: 讲一次你做实验但结果出乎意料的经历。

questions.title: Describe a time you had to learn a new technology or domain quickly.
questions.title_zh: 描述一次你必须快速学习新技术或新领域的经历。

questions.title: Tell me about a time you went above and beyond for a customer.
questions.title_zh: 讲一次你为客户付出超出预期的经历。

questions.title: Describe a time customer feedback changed your direction.
questions.title_zh: 描述一次客户反馈改变了你方向的经历。

questions.title: Tell me about a time you advocated for the user against business pressure.
questions.title_zh: 讲一次你为用户而对抗业务压力的经历。

questions.title: Describe a time you had to balance competing user needs.
questions.title_zh: 描述一次你必须平衡相互竞争用户需求的经历。

questions.title: Tell me about a time you used customer data to drive a decision.
questions.title_zh: 讲一次你用客户数据驱动决策的经历。

questions.title: Tell me about a time you had to handle competing priorities.
questions.title_zh: 讲一次你处理相互竞争优先级的经历。

questions.title: Describe a time you missed a deadline.
questions.title_zh: 描述一次你错过截止日期的经历。

questions.title: Tell me about a time you had to say no.
questions.title_zh: 讲一次你不得不说"不"的经历。

questions.title: Describe a time you had to manage a high-pressure deadline.
questions.title_zh: 描述一次你管理高压截止日期的经历。

questions.title: Tell me about a time you had to balance speed vs. quality.
questions.title_zh: 讲一次你必须平衡速度与质量的经历。

questions.title: Tell me about a time you took on something outside your comfort zone.
questions.title_zh: 讲一次你承担舒适区之外事情的经历。

questions.title: Describe a time you proactively sought out feedback.
questions.title_zh: 描述一次你主动寻求反馈的经历。

questions.title: Tell me about a goal you set for yourself and achieved.
questions.title_zh: 讲一个你给自己设定并达成的目标。

questions.title: Describe how you have grown in the last year or two.
questions.title_zh: 描述你在过去一两年中是如何成长的。
